dj_text: You have tuned into That Pirate Bot DJ Radio. The signal is clear. The purpose is unclear. The vibes are immaculate. From Kriminel, into something calmer. Linen Ud.
commercial_text: Tired of coffee that actually tastes good?
hijack_text: You've stumbled onto Nostalgia Overload Radio from the Timel
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: Linen Ud
